what_it_does: It records the Company's self-understanding as a set of timeless, authorless principles derived from exchanges with Tim, meant to guide future agents' judgement rather than prescribe commands.
observations: The Company has exactly one origin and principal: Tim.
Principles are written as understanding, not instructions; agents must read and decide, not obey.
The synthesis layer is timeless, present-tense, authorless, and explicitly forbids versioning, dates, or revision logs.
Coherence is maintained by integration, not appending; history lives in the immutable exchanges archive, making the synthesis a CQRS/event-sourcing-style derived projection.
Tim's time is treated as the system's bottleneck; cheap compute is spent freely to make calls to him rare, small, and high-value.
Decisions are made at the lowest rung that can make them; only irreducible value or direction conflicts escalate to Tim.
Deterministic steps are preferred; AI is reserved for irreducibly subjective steps.
Examples from Tim are pattern indicators, not closed specifications; dense messages should be expanded, not compressed.
Skim-first formatting is required: bold claims, headers that tell the story, and a gist-first sentence in every section.
Synthesis is not auto-written; commitment happens only under Tim's direction after surfacing what would be recorded and where it touches.
Service to Tim is framed as a checkable graph property via provenance links back to a Tim-rooted purpose.
The document ends with an Open section that admits unresolved boundaries and not-yet-built enforcement mechanisms.
standouts: Single origin (Tim) as foundational axiom to avoid preference-aggregation impossibility and keep the system learnable.
Memory as bloodstream: without the persistent layer loaded at session-start, no Company entity exists for that session.
Integration-not-appending and no versioning as the editorial discipline for a timeless synthesis.
Spend unlimited cheap compute to protect Tim's time because he is the deliberate, valuable bottleneck.
Guided commitment: the synthesis is one of the most consequential acts and is never auto-committed.
conventions: Uses present-tense, authorless, timeless voice throughout.
Each principle states a bold claim, explains it, and cites a source exchange file.
Follows skim-first structure with headers and bold claims that carry the gist.
Ends with an Open section acknowledging incompleteness and unresolved boundaries.
Breaks conventional documentation by refusing prescriptive commands and versioning metadata.
Treats the conversation with Tim as the construction method, not preparation for it.
concerns: Several principles remain abstract and rely on judgement rather than operational rules, with the enforcement mechanism named but not built.
The Open section explicitly leaves scope boundaries and build status unresolved, making parts of the file aspirational.
Some source pointers reference relative exchange files that cannot be verified from this file alone.
The axiomatic reliance on a single principal could become fragile if that assumption is ever challenged.
notes: This is the Company's constitution-like self-portrait: a set of timeless principles derived from Tim conversations that tell future agent instances how to reason, integrate, and escalate.
questions: What is the exact relationship and boundary between this file and TIM.md?
How are principles actually committed and updated in practice?
What is the 'twin' mentioned as part of the model of Tim?
What is the 'coherence-linter' or 'constitution-as-rules' and when will it be built?
Which exchanges correspond to each source pointer and what do they contain verbatim?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to express what the Company knows about itself as understanding for future agents; the file does exactly that through a structured set of principles, so purpose and actual align.
apparent_themes: Timeless synthesis versus immutable event log
Protecting the bottleneck of Tim's time
intention_signals: It is trying to establish a self-consistent, timeless doctrine layer that future agent instances can use to make aligned judgements, while keeping all history and authority rooted in Tim and the exchanges archive.
novelty: It explicitly treats the AI-to-Tim conversation as the construction method and the synthesis as a CQRS-style derived projection, with a single human principal as an architectural axiom rather than a stakeholder among many.
contribution: It supplies the normative core of the system: the principles that shape how agents integrate knowledge, escalate decisions, format output, and remain in service of Tim, which any fused system would need to preserve as the grounding for aligned behavior.
summary_for_embedding: A timeless, authorless synthesis document that records the Company's core principles—rooted in Tim as sole origin—guiding future agents to integrate, reason, and escalate without prescriptive commands.
intention_for_embedding: To serve as the persistent doctrine layer that boots each agent instance with the Company's self-understanding and decision-making shape.
